{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035947F8715B69FFDAF8D7DED3"}"},"total":2665},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6927647236357029895","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我唯一一次从头一直看，毫无跳跃的书籍，虽然有些不符合常理，但看小说不能带脑子，故事是活灵活现，人物是有血有肉，总的来说，真不错👍👍👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1612968568,"group_id":"6918021487915961352","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"牛逼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N66QMjNQr+DK+f6o61Nvo3c=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"86203597368","user_name":"炸天帮 帮主 龙傲天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86203597368","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6918021487915961352","book_info":{"abstract":"二十一世纪的科研天才李承风穿越大唐，居然变成了李世民的六岁儿子？
  天赐神级熊孩子系统，李承风揪李世民的胡子，开局狂怼房玄龄和杜如晦，他们对此却又无可奈何。
  李承风利用自己的天才科学知识，一招南水北调解决天灾，研发出来的杂交水稻可亩产2000斤。
  灭突厥，降伏高句丽，李承风六岁就被赐封为大唐镇国神王。
  可谓莫愁前路无知己，天下谁人不识君？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1871143ffaa83d217e191847aab0fd1d","author":"推塔天王","author_id":"","book_id":"6918021487915961352","book_name":"大唐：六岁皇子，开局拔李二胡子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4476人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6918140394463363591","read_count":"4476","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4124379"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"1975","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,大唐,天才,开局,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5ee22101ab622ea4cae70547edb41869~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393588&x-signature=Zlu8CP4DlsxznVittdVRrih3x8Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_in
